user.title: Connect to Ultra Card Pro Cloud
user.description: Enter your ultracard.io credentials to unlock PRO features on all your devices. This integration also adds an Ultra Card item to the sidebar (Hub) where you can view favorites, presets, and colors.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Ultra Card Pro Cloud
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials need to be updated. Please enter your current ultracard.io login.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Please check your credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to ultracard.io. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
